entities.description: The region where the research was conducted.

entities.description: The total weight and length of roots per unit land area.

entities.description: The ratio of root weight to the total weight of the plant.

entities.description: The total dry matter produced per unit land area.

relationships.description: increases ratio in widely spaced crops
increases total dry matter per unit land area
no significant increase in dense stands
